report.summary: Quiet cycle: no new commits or deploys. Published pages steady at 560, publish queue at 2, uncommitted files grew 205→215. TS errors and API routes unchanged.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 560 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 558 last cycle — 2 pages promoted)
457/560 published slugs have matching page.tsx files; 103 still missing (unchanged backlog)
142 TypeScript errors across 5 files: 4 learn pages (JSX escaping) + structured-data.examples.ts (reference-only)
102 TS errors in app files (UNCHANGED): lido-v3-stvaults, crypto-arbitrage, institutional-adoption, crypto-index-funds
Build uses ignoreBuildErrors: true — TS errors do not block Vercel deploys
No new regressions detected — error set is stable from prior cycle
Live site verification blocked by egress proxy — cannot confirm HTTP 200 on production

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API route files present and structurally intact: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s/swr120), trending (300s/swr600), fear-greed (600s/swr1200), market-metrics (60s/swr120), market-dominance (300s/swr600), defi-yields (300s/swr600)
defi-yields has best resilience: circuit breaker (5-fail threshold, 1min reset), retries with exponential backoff, 5s timeout
market-metrics and market-dominance return HTTP 200 even when serving fallback/simulated data — clients can't distinguish real vs mock
CRITICAL: 0/6 API routes use the rate limiter module at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts — still unused
No code changes to API routes this cycle — all stable
Cannot verify live API responses from sandbox (egress blocked)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
215 uncommitted files: 201 untracked + 28 modified (up from 205 last cycle — grew by 10)
No new commits or deploys since last cycle — production still running commit 21aaf5b
next.config.ts: standalone output disabled, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true, image cache TTL=86400s
Security headers configured: X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy
Static assets served with immutable cache headers (1yr TTL)
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from sandbox (degen0x.com egress blocked)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Delta this cycle: 2 new pages promoted from queue to published (+2 slugs to 560), 10 new uncommitted files (205→215)
No commits or deploys this cycle — content accumulation continues
BLOCKER [P0]: 215 uncommitted files need commit + push + Vercel deploy. Gap widening every cycle
Carry-over [P1]: Fix 4 learn pages with JSX escaping errors — 102 TS errors in app code
Carry-over [P1]: Add rate limiting to 6 API routes — rate limiter module exists but unused
Carry-over [P2]: Fix market-metrics and market-dominance to return non-200 status on fallback data
Carry-over [P2]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx files (long-standing backlog)
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages remaining (desci-decentralized-science, gamblefi-onchain-betting)
